channel.title: BC forest comment alerts: south and central Vancouver Island
channel.description: Forest Operations Map blocks with an open public comment period around Port Renfrew, Lake Cowichan, Nitinat, and the Alberni Valley. Built from BC public open data.

item.title: Nitinat: block 852406 open until 2026-06-26
item.description: South Island area. Planned 2026-07-15. near a fish record. Comment closes 2026-06-26. Area: Nitinat.

item.description: South Island area. Planned 2026-07-15. near a fish record. Comment closes 2026-06-26. Area: Nitinat.

item.title: Nitinat: block 854203 open until 2026-06-26
item.description: South Island area. Planned 2026-07-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-06-26. Area: Nitinat.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block ROA25-1 open until 2026-07-03
